## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New backend / skill / problem family
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff format .` and `ruff check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy` passes (strict)
- [ ] `pytest --cov=qf_agentos` passes and coverage is not lowered
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behaviour changed
- [ ] Preserves the design invariants (fair comparison, mechanical encoding-loss
      re-checks, classical-biased auditor, abstention, determinism, no autonomous
      financial actions — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
